steps.expected: Worldview tab active with empty state
steps.observed: Worldview tab active, New Scene button visible

steps.expected: Scene 1 chip appears, 'Create a 3D World' CTA shown
steps.observed: Scene 1 chip created and active, 'Create a 3D World' CTA displayed

steps.action: Click 'Create a 3D World' CTA in Scene 1
steps.expected: Creator panel opens with text prompt, model selector, Generate World button
steps.observed: Creator panel opened with text/image toggle, textarea, model selector (Marble 0.1-plus selected), Generate World button (disabled)

steps.action: Enter prompt 'test world for scene isolation' and click 'Generate World'
steps.expected: API call fails with error toast/inline error (no WORLDLABS_API_KEY)
steps.observed: Error state displayed: 'World generation failed' with 'Failed to send a request to the Edge Function' and Retry button

steps.expected: Inline error with retry button visible
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing 'World generation failed' error with Retry button

steps.expected: Scene 2 created with clean 'Create a 3D World' CTA (no error leakage from Scene 1)
steps.observed: Scene 2 chip created and active, clean 'Create a 3D World' CTA displayed — NO error from Scene 1
Screenshot captured showing Scene 2 with 'Create a 3D World' CTA, no error state

steps.action: Switch back to Scene 1 by clicking its chip
steps.expected: Scene 1's error state is preserved (not cleared)
steps.observed: Scene 1 active, 'World generation failed' error and Retry button still displayed

steps.expected: Error state still visible after switching away and back
steps.observed: Screenshot captured confirming error state preservation

steps.action: Click 'Retry' to open creator panel in Scene 1
steps.observed: Creator panel opened with text/image toggle, textarea, model selector, Generate World button

steps.expected: Scene 2 shows CTA button, NOT the creator panel from Scene 1
steps.observed: Scene 2 shows 'Create a 3D World' CTA — creator panel did NOT leak from Scene 1

steps.expected: Clean CTA state, no creator panel
steps.observed: Screenshot captured confirming Scene 2 has CTA, not creator panel

steps.expected: Scene 1's creator panel is still open
steps.observed: Scene 1 shows creator panel with text/image toggle, textarea, model selector — preserved

steps.expected: Creator panel still open after round-trip
steps.observed: Screenshot captured confirming creator panel still open in Scene 1

evidence.network: POST to worldlabs-proxy Edge Function -> failed (expected, no API key)

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-CROSS-006): PASSED. All 4 isolation checks verified: (1) Error state does not leak from Scene A to Scene B, (2) Error state is preserved in Scene A after switching away and back, (3) showCreator panel does not leak from Scene A to Scene B, (4) showCreator panel is preserved in Scene A after switching away and back.
